title: 5 things God builds in a man who shows up
caption:
God isn't building the most talented man. He's building the one who keeps showing up.

Most men want the results without the reps. They want the character without the cost, the trust without the track record.

But the man who does the work — who shows up when nobody's watching, keeps his word when it costs him, stays in the gap between planting and harvest — that's who God shapes into something real.

Five things He's building in you right now, whether you feel it or not:

Trait 1: Character in the dark — faithfulness when it costs, not when it's comfortable.
Trait 2: A man people can count on — your word before anyone else is keeping score.
Trait 3: The muscle of delayed reward — strong enough to wait for what actually matters.
Trait 4: A quieter mind — able to hear what the distracted man can't.
Trait 5: Someone worth following — because you built a life that gives something.

"Let steadfastness have its full effect, that you may be perfect and complete, lacking in nothing." — James 1:4

The 20s aren't for arriving. They're for getting built.

—

Comment "built" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
